tools.name: validate_and_render_mermaid_diagram
tools.description:
Use this tool to output a Mermaid diagram:
- The tool will validate the diagram syntax and render it to a UI widget.
- The widget will contain the diagram code, a "Copy Code" button, and a rendered diagram.
- If the diagram is invalid, the widget will give user a link to repair the diagram in Mermaid Live.

diagramCode.description: The Mermaid diagram code to validate and render

prompt_template.system: Use this tool to render any Mermaid diagram. It validates the syntax and returns an interactive SVG widget. Ideal for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, gantt charts, and any Mermaid-supported diagram type.

example_call.diagram_code:
graph TD
    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
    B -->|Yes| C[OK]
    B -->|No| D[End]
